user_query:
Please read input/providers.json and input/availability.json, then help me schedule a "Tire Rotation & Balance" near ZIP 94107 within 5 miles for Saturday, May 2, 2026. Only consider appointment times between 10:00 and 14:00 local time (inclusive). Apply these rules to pick the provider: (1) lowest price; (2) if prices tie, choose the highest rating; (3) if still tied, choose the provider whose earliest available slot within the window is earliest. Use my customer details for the booking: Name: Alex Morgan; Email: alex.morgan@example.com; Phone: +14155550123. Write two files:

1) output/booking.json with this JSON schema:
{
  "providerId": string,
  "providerName": string,
  "serviceId": string,
  "serviceName": "Tire Rotation & Balance",
  "price": number,
  "date": "2026-05-02",
  "timeSlot": "<ISO 8601 with timezone offset>",
  "customer": { "name": "Alex Morgan", "email": "alex.morgan@example.com", "phone": "+14155550123" },
  "criteria": {
    "zipCode": "94107",
    "maxDistanceMiles": 5,
    "date": "2026-05-02",
    "windowStart": "10:00",
    "windowEnd": "14:00",
    "timezone": "America/Los_Angeles",
    "tieBreakers": ["lowest_price", "highest_rating", "earliest_slot"]
  }
}
- Choose the timeSlot as the earliest available slot for the chosen provider that falls within 10:00–14:00 local time on 2026-05-02 (inclusive).

2) output/shortlist.json with this JSON schema:
{
  "eligibleProviders": [
    { "providerId": string, "providerName": string, "serviceId": string, "serviceName": "Tire Rotation & Balance", "price": number, "rating": number, "firstEligibleSlot": "<ISO 8601 within the 10:00–14:00 window>" }
  ],
  "selectionOrder": ["<providerId>", ...],
  "chosenProviderId": "<providerId that matches booking.json>"
}
- Include only providers that (a) offer "Tire Rotation & Balance", (b) are within 5 miles, and (c) have at least one slot on 2026-05-02 between 10:00 and 14:00 inclusive in input/availability.json.
- Sort selectionOrder using the tie-breakers above (lowest price, then highest rating, then earliest firstEligibleSlot).

Make sure both files exactly follow the schemas and write them under output/ with the specified filenames.
